title: citronella gongonha
intro: Citronella gongonha, also known as Pluchea modosa, is a type of flowering plant native to South America, belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of citronella gongonha include its potential to aid in the treatment of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of citronella gongonha include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
